Moment.title: Moment
Moment.description: A social post shared by a user.

userId.description: The UID of the user who created the moment.

userName.description: The display name of the user.

userPhoto.description: The profile photo URL of the user.

content.description: The text content of the moment.

imageUrl.description: Optional URL to an image stored in Firebase Storage.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the moment was created.

/moments/{momentId}.description: Collection of social moments shared by users.
